facts.fact: Chronological list of React community conferences (React Conf, React Amsterdam, Chain React, CityJS, React Alicante, App.js, etc.)
Split into Upcoming vs Past Conferences
Specific named conferences with dates and locations are enumerated
Create React App deprecated for new apps (Feb 14 2025)
Migrate to a framework OR a build tool (Vite, Parcel, RSBuild)
Docs for building a React app from scratch when a framework isn't a fit
Validates that hooks follow the Rules of Hooks (consistent call order)
Common violations: conditionals, loops, early returns, callbacks, async, class methods, module level
The `use` hook is an exception (can be conditional / in loops)
Invalid vs Valid code examples for the rule
<style> renders inline CSS stylesheets into the document head
precedence prop ranks sheets; href/media/nonce props; de-duplication behavior
Can be rendered from any component
